title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review February 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose by 0.34% month-over-month (MoM) in February.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined by 31.41% MoM in February.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • BC LCFS monthly trading witnessed a fall of 91.37% MoM.
  • In January, BC LCFS saw a fall in credit prices by 7.29% MoM.
Oregon CFP:
  • In January, OR CFP average credit prices decreased by 33.53% compared to December.
  • OR CFP trading activity in January fell as 440.82k credits were transferred.
Canada CFR:
  • Canada CFR CC2 bid prices rose by 1.87% whereas offer prices declined by 11.05% MoM.
  • CC3 offer prices continued to rise by 0.48% MoM.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 10.81% MoM.
  • For January, 286.11K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $6.49M.
Â United States RFS:
  • RIN generation decreased by 27.06% in January.
  • A total of 4.29B RINs were transacted in January, 51.02% less than December.
author: Mansift Kaur
